content.en:
Ye Tian learned a lot of information from the Hundred Spirits Ancestor, but there was some information, and the Hundred Spirits Ancestor also pretended to be confused.

Ye Tian knew very well that the Ancestor of the Hundred Spirits definitely did not reveal all the news, and there was only one information that was really useful to Ye Tian, and that was the information of the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land.

Maybe for the Hundred Spirits Ancestor, this information is of little use, but for Ye Tian, this information is too useful.

The strength of the Haitian Holy Sect is weak, so the strength of the Haitian Forbidden Land is weak.

He can completely destroy those alien beasts in the forbidden land of the sea and sky, and then use the copying talent to copy a strange beast, and enter the heaven and earth where the Haitian Holy Sect is located through that strange beast, so as to enter another world and seek the secret of breakthrough.

This method is applicable to the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, because the Bone Clan is too powerful to send a Bone Emperor to descend at any time.

And if he dares to copy a bone king who died in battle, he will definitely be discovered.

However, those strange beasts in the forbidden land of the sea and sky are different, the number is very rare, if he kills the other side of the door, bombards those strange beasts, and slaughters the strange beasts in a short time, the sea and sky holy sect will not be able to react.

"Although the sea water in the forbidden land of the sea and sky will limit part of my strength, my strength is too strong, and it is nothing to suppress part of it. "

Ye Tian thought to himself, so he let his copy body go to the forbidden land of sea and sky.

Wow!

In an instant, Ye Tian came to the outside of the forbidden land of the sea and sky.

Then, he stepped into the forbidden land of sea and sky, and was enveloped by countless seawaters, which continued to eat away at his body and suppressed about thirty percent of his strength.

It's nothing to suppress only three percent of his strength, and he is still invincible at the top ancestor.

"An Ancestor from the outside world has broken in and killed him!"

The alien beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect rushed over.

These beasts are all strange, but each individual is very large.

From the aura on their bodies, Ye Tian roughly judged their strength, most of them were at the level of ordinary ancestors, a few elite ancestors, only five were comparable to the top ancestors, and the strength revealed by the hundred ancestors was still weaker.

Ye Tian didn't show his full strength at the first time, otherwise after these alien beasts were afraid, he was afraid that he would immediately send alien beasts to rescue, in that case, he would be easily exposed.

Therefore, he showed very weak strength at the beginning, and he could reach the level of a top ancestor.

As a result, Ye Tian was deliberately injured by them, but he kept approaching the position of the door during the battle.

The Sea and Sky Forbidden Land is not as large as the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, which shows that the strength of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect is not as good as that of the Bone Clan, so the forbidden land opened up in the Dark Forbidden Land is not large.

These strange beasts were completely unaware of Ye Tian's purpose, and they didn't know that Ye Tian's target was the door at all.

"There are two strange beasts sitting on the edge of the door, one is comparable to the elite ancestor, and the strength of the other is comparable to the top ancestor, but it is not a powerful top ancestor, but an ordinary top ancestor, such a top ancestor, even if his strength is suppressed, at most a few moves can kill the other party. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian suddenly erupted with all his strength, and layers of extreme defense ancestral skills were displayed, and the attacks of those alien beasts were all blocked, and they couldn't hurt Ye Tian at all.

Several strange beasts were directly blasted into a blood mist, and they fell immediately, making Ye Tian rush out and go straight to the door.

At this time, those strange beasts finally came to their senses.

Ye Tian pretended to be a pig and ate a tiger, deliberately disguising his strength, but the target was their portal.

"Go and ask for help, this ancestor is going to destroy our door!"

One by one, the beasts roared.

The two strange beasts guarding the gate immediately realized that they were about to shuttle through the door to ask for help.

However, they were too late.

At this time, Ye Tian performed an Ultimate Ancestral Technique, the Eternal Ultimate Ancestral Technique, which was the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Time, and combined with the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Dream Butterfly, he directly fixed time and space.

If the strength of these two alien beasts is comparable to Ye Tian, then they definitely have the strength to break time and space, but their strength is a little worse, so they are directly fixed, maybe they can break time and space, but it will take a little time.

And Ye Tian would not give them this time.

At this time, Ye Tian rushed over at the fastest speed, and the blessing of the two speed-type ultimate ancestral skills directly made Ye Tian rush to the side of the portal, and no one could stop him.

After coming to the door, Ye Tian smashed the alien beast comparable to the elite ancestor with one hand, and killed the other party with one move.

Then.

Ye Tian blasted another alien beast away with one punch.

He stood at the door, not allowing any beast to pass through.

It's his!

"Damn, he's not trying to break the door, he's trying to occupy our door and rush through it with all his might!"

The alien beasts used forbidden spells at all costs and killed Ye Tian one after another.

And this time.

Ye Tian's body descended and stepped into the forbidden land of sea and sky.

If it was the forbidden land of the sea of bones, Ye Tian's body would not dare to step into it, but he would dare to step into the forbidden land of the sea and sky.

The door could not transmit news, so the matter here could not pass through, and under normal circumstances, the Sea and Sky Holy Sect on the other side of the door would not send a strange beast over, so there was no way to know it immediately.

Therefore, it is very safe for the body to enter here.

Moreover.

With his current strength, even if a strange beast comparable to the Supreme Ancestor really descended, he could easily leave.

As Ye Tian's body entered the forbidden land of the sea and sky, he cooperated with the replication body to slaughter these strange beasts.

Those weaker beasts, Ye Tian almost killed one with one move.

In a short time, there were only five strange beasts left.

The strength of these five alien beasts is comparable to that of the top ancestor, but it is still not Ye Tian's opponent, the most powerful alien beast is comparable to the very powerful top ancestor, but its strength is much weaker than Ye Tian.

Soon, the other four alien beasts had all been killed by Ye Tian, and only this last powerful alien beast remained.

This alien beast has a lot of means to save its life, and its strength is very strong, so it has resisted for a long time.

But in the end, this strange beast was still killed by Ye Tian.

Of course, Ye Tian also consumes a lot.

I have to say that if the strength of the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land was stronger, it would be much more difficult for him to destroy these strange beasts.

"The alien beasts of the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land were all wiped out by me, and the Sea and Sky Holy Sect of the other Heaven and Earth would never be able to perceive their death. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He lifted the copy of the body, and immediately sped up time.

Soon, replication capabilities can continue to be used.

This time, Ye Tian copied the most powerful beast.

Rumble!!!!

A large, ape-like beast with six arms appeared.

Compared with the previous beast, the beast copied by Ye Tian was exactly the same, even the soul was the same.

At the beginning, the bone clan copied by Ye Tian was recognized as the real bone clan by the origin of the dark forbidden land, thus obliterating the copied body.

Obviously, the origin of the Dark Forbidden Land could not distinguish the authenticity of Ye Tian's copy body.

Therefore, this replica body can definitely enter the door and will not be recognized.

Subsequently, Ye Tian plundered all the resources of the Haitian Forbidden Land, creating the illusion of robbing the resources of the Haitian Forbidden Land.

Then, Ye Tian made a move to severely damage the replica's body, and he was in a state of being seriously injured and dying, otherwise he would not have any injuries at all, and if he passed through the portal, he would be suspected by the Haitian Holy Sect.

Not only was the body of this replica body severely damaged, but even the soul was in a state of being about to shatter, but it would not really shatter.

"That's pretty much it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
